data.title: MrBeast's New Challenges Are Absolutely Unhinged (Again): A Jet, A Jail, A Gym—And $1.5 Million On The Line
data.description: MrBeast has unveiled his wildest stunts yet—offering $1.5 million across three extreme challenges involving 100 days in a jet, a jail, and a gym—as he continues to blend high-stakes entertainment with viral philanthropy.

data.title: Bitcoin's Recent Struggles Aside, Gold Hit A New All-Time High Shining A Bright Spotlight On These Precious Metal Cryptos That Rocked In 2025
data.description:
Gold prices hit an all-time high Wednesday as the Federal Reserve projected slower economic growth and higher inflation, boosting demand for the safe haven.



What happened: Spot gold hit $3,056 per ounce earlier in the day before retracing slightly. Gold futures on the Commodity Exchange jumped to $3,060.20.

data.title: Elon Musk's Tesla Faces $1.4 Billion Discrepancy In Capital Expenditure: Report
data.description: Tesla Inc. has a $1.4B gap between its expenditures and asset valuation, raising concerns over its financial strategies.

data.title: Federal Reserve Brings Back 'Transitory' Inflation Amid Tariff War: Economist Mohamed El-Erian Calls It A 'Big Policy Mistake'
data.description: Mohamed El-Erian criticizes Fed Chair Jerome Powell's use of the word "transitory" to describe the potential inflationary impact of tariffs.

data.title: Masayoshi Son's SoftBank Buys Oracle-Backed Ampere For $6.5 Billion To Boost US AI Push
data.description: SoftBank has acquired Oracle-backed Ampere for $6.5 billion to strengthen its AI infrastructure strategy in the U.S., marking a major step in its broader push into Arm-based computing and large-scale AI development.
